error.department_code_exists: Department with code "%code%" already exists in organization "%organizationId%".
error.department_circular_reference: Moving department "%departmentId%" would create a circular reference.
error.employee_already_exists: User "%userId%" is already an employee of organization "%organizationId%".
error.invitation_not_found_by_token: Invitation not found for the given token.
error.invitation_already_exists: A pending invitation for "%email%" already exists in organization "%organizationId%".
error.role_already_exists: Role with name "%name%" already exists in organization "%organizationId%".
error.cannot_delete_system_role: Cannot delete system role with ID "%id%".
error.permission_already_exists: Permission for resource "%resource%" and action "%action%" already exists for role "%roleId%".
